# Noto Sans CJK

`desktop/src/assets/fonts/NotoSansSC-VF.ttf` is the Simplified Chinese subset
variable TTF from the Noto Sans CJK project:

- Upstream: https://github.com/notofonts/noto-cjk
- Source path: `Sans/Variable/TTF/Subset/NotoSansSC-VF.ttf`
- License: SIL Open Font License 1.1 (`OFL.txt`)

The font is redistributed unchanged and used only as a bundled GUI typeface.
